mapper.select: SELECT id AS skuId, product_id AS productId, sku_code AS skuCode, name, spec_json AS specJson, price, cost_price AS costPrice, stock, sales_count AS salesCount, image_url AS imageUrl, ai_tryon_enabled AS aiTryonEnabled, tryon_category AS tryonCategory, tryon_image_url AS tryonImageUrl, tryon_mask_url AS tryonMaskUrl, tryon_sort AS tryonSort, weight, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM tb_sku WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT s.id AS skuId, s.product_id AS productId, st.warehouse_id AS warehouseId, s.price AS price, st.available AS available FROM tb_sku s INNER JOIN tb_product p ON p.id = s.product_id INNER JOIN tb_stock st ON st.sku_id = s.id WHERE p.status = 1 AND s.status = 1 AND st.available > 0 ORDER BY s.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_sku SET sales_count = sales_count + #{quantity}, stock = CASE WHEN stock >= #{quantity} THEN stock - #{quantity} ELSE 0 END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{skuId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_sku s INNER JOIN tb_product p ON p.id = s.product_id WHERE p.status = 1 AND s.status = 1 AND s.ai_tryon_enabled = 1 AND s.tryon_category = #{slotType}
AND ( p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.sub_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
